COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as a reassignment from the department of the Presiding Judge for court trial in Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
Appearances:
Ruth E. Auerbach, Esq., for plaintiff Wyeth Pharmaceuticals. No appearances by defendants Drumm Medical Management, Inc., dba Drumm Medical Center and Smith Ketchum, M.D.

EXH 1: Declaration of Rosemary Chandler, Sr. Analyst for plaintiff....ID/EVID

After hearing evidence and declaration presented, the court grants judgment as follows:
Damages $5,295.00
Interest $999.05
Attorney Fees $660.00
Costs $203.60 For a Total of $7,157.65.

Judgment submitted and signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION Notice Of Continued Hearing On Motion To Withdraw For Defendants
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joel K. Belway, Esq., 455-5650, moving to Withdraw as counsel For Defendants Smith A. Ketchum III, M.D. and DRUMM MEDICAL MANAGEMENT, INC., A CORP. DBA DRUMM

RULING:
No other appearances on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing
required". Therefore, the Court granted Counsel Joel K. Belway of the Joel K. Belway, P.C.'s Motion To Withdraw as counsel For DEFENDANTs Smith A. Ketchum III, M.D. and DRUMM MEDICAL MANAGEMENT, INC., A CORP. DBA DRUMM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (KMM/301/JU) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2003 Continued To Oct-20-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Parties' request for a continuance was untimely. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, the Court denied COUNSEL Joel K. Belway's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANTS DRUMM MEDICAL MANAGEMENT, INC. DBA DRUMM and SMITH KETCHUM. (JLW/301/JU) Reporter: Beldon Yee CSR #2647
